output.sparql:
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?episode ?episodeLabel WHERE {
  wd:Q6350508 wdt:P361 ?episode .
  ?episode wdt:P2697 ?description .
  ?episode rdfs:label ?episodeLabel .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?description) , "turned into a vampire"))
  .
  FILTER(LANG(?description) = "en" && LANG(?episodeLabel) = "en")
}
LIMIT 1
